description: Product, economy, season, quest, cohort, risk and ops analytics from ClickHouse events_v2 only. Postgres state is ingested by meta_analytics snapshots.

targets.rawSql: SELECT argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['coinSupply']), created_at) AS coin_supply FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.economy_totals' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['players']), created_at) AS players FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.season_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT uniqExact(user_id) AS dau FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE user_id > 0 AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['unresolvedDispatchFailures']), created_at) AS unresolved FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.ops_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT created_at AS time, params['module'] AS module, toInt64OrZero(params['stake']) AS stake FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_economy_window' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, params['module'] AS module, if(toFloat64OrZero(params['stake']) = 0, 0, round(100 * toFloat64OrZero(params['payout']) / toFloat64OrZero(params['stake']), 2)) AS rtp_percent FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_economy_window' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) ORDER BY time

SELECT time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at AS time, 'players' AS metric, toInt64OrZero(params['players']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.season_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at AS time, 'games' AS metric, toInt64OrZero(params['games']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.season_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at AS time, 'clans' AS metric, toInt64OrZero(params['clans']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.season_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC

SELECT time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at AS time, 'completed' AS metric, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['completed'])) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.quest_period_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT created_at AS time, 'claimed' AS metric, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['claimed'])) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.quest_period_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT created_at AS time, 'started' AS metric, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['started'])) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.quest_period_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC

SELECT time, metric, value FROM (SELECT toStartOfDay(created_at) AS time, 'DAU' AS metric, uniqExact(user_id) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE user_id > 0 AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time UNION ALL SELECT toStartOfDay(created_at) AS time, 'events' AS metric, count() AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY time) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC

SELECT params['questId'] AS quest_id, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['rows']), created_at) AS rows, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['started']), created_at) AS started, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['completed']), created_at) AS completed, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['claimed']), created_at) AS claimed, round(100 * completed / greatest(rows, 1), 2) AS completion_percent, round(100 * claimed / greatest(completed, 1), 2) AS claim_percent FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.quest_snapshot' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY quest_id ORDER BY completed DESC, rows DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT params['module'] AS module, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['stake'])) AS stake, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['payout'])) AS payout, sum(toInt64OrZero(params['net'])) AS net, if(stake = 0, 0, round(100 * payout / stake, 2)) AS rtp_percent, uniqExact(params['users']) AS user_buckets FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_economy_window' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY module ORDER BY stake DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT toInt64OrZero(params['userId']) AS user_id, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['coins']), created_at) AS coins, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['rank']), created_at) AS rank, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['balanceScopeId']), created_at) AS scope_id FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.whale_balance' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY rank ASC LIMIT 25

SELECT toInt64OrZero(params['userId']) AS user_id, argMax(params['displayName'], created_at) AS display_name, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['stake']), created_at) AS stake, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['payout']), created_at) AS payout, round(100 * argMax(toFloat64OrZero(params['rtp']), created_at), 2) AS rtp_percent FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.player_rtp' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY rtp_percent DESC, stake DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT params['severity'] AS severity, params['status'] AS status, argMax(toInt64OrZero(params['rows']), created_at) AS rows FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.risk_flags' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY severity, status ORDER BY rows DESC

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'users' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['users']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'active wallets 24h', toFloat64OrZero(params['activeWallets24H']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'transacting users 24h', toFloat64OrZero(params['transactingUsers24H']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'active chats 24h' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['activeChats24H']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'active scopes 24h', toFloat64OrZero(params['activeScopes24H']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'daily claimers', toFloat64OrZero(params['dailyClaimersToday']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.engagement_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'started' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['updatesStartedWindow']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'completed', toFloat64OrZero(params['updatesCompletedWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'failed', toFloat64OrZero(params['updatesFailedWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'average' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['updateLatencyAvgMs']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'p95', toFloat64OrZero(params['updateLatencyP95Ms']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'pending' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['outboxPending']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'sent 5m', toFloat64OrZero(params['outboxSentWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'failed', toFloat64OrZero(params['outboxFailed']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.delivery_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'mini-game sessions' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['activeMiniGameSessions']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'challenges', toFloat64OrZero(params['openChallenges']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'lotteries', toFloat64OrZero(params['openLotteries']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'daily lotteries', toFloat64OrZero(params['openDailyLotteries']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'poker tables' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['activePokerTables']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'poker seats', toFloat64OrZero(params['activePokerSeats']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'secret hitler games', toFloat64OrZero(params['activeSecretHitlerGames']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'secret hitler players', toFloat64OrZero(params['activeSecretHitlerPlayers']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.game_state_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

SELECT created_at AS time, metric, value FROM (SELECT created_at, 'rows' AS metric, toFloat64OrZero(params['rowsWindow']) AS value FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.ledger_health_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'credits', toFloat64OrZero(params['creditsWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.ledger_health_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'debits', toFloat64OrZero(params['debitsWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.ledger_health_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at) UNION ALL SELECT created_at, 'net', toFloat64OrZero(params['netWindow']) FROM cazinoshiz.events_v2 WHERE event_type = 'meta_analytics.ledger_health_snapshot' AND project = 'cazinoshiz' AND $__timeFilter(created_at)) ORDER BY time

title: CasinoShiz Product Analytics
